positive: A highly stylized, minimalist depiction of a crescent moon cradling a cluster of luminous, stylized stars and nebulae. The celestial elements should be rendered with clean, geometric lines and bold, contrasting color blocking of deep indigo, cosmic cyan, and vibrant gold. The composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, suitable for a repeating apparel print. Flat graphic design aesthetic, strong silhouettes, high contrast, clean vector illustration style, inspired by Art Deco celestial maps, printed on a solid background.
